criteria_grades.evidence: Subject: 'Revolutionizing Your Application Monitoring with DevMonitor - A Simple Solution for Your Bootstrapped Team' (14 words, lowercase=False)

criteria_grades.text: Email acknowledges the bootstrapped context (small team, limited resources, no dedicated DevOps)

criteria_grades.evidence: Banned phrase: 'i wanted to reach out'

criteria_grades.text: Proof point is relevant to a small team (caught issues early, saved revenue)
Voice is direct and no-BS (no corporate polish)
Does not ask for a meeting
Every sentence serves the reader (bootstrapped founder's time is precious)
